tasks.subject: Task 0: Pre-flight Setup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create docs/features/ and docs/archive/ dirs, move V1 overview docs to archive, scaffold README index.

**Files:**
- Create dir: docs/features/
- Create dir: docs/archive/
- Move: docs/PROJECT-OVERVIEW.md -> docs/archive/
- Move: docs/V2-OVERVIEW.md -> docs/archive/
- Create: docs/features/README.md

**Verify:** `ls docs/features/ docs/archive/ && git log -1 --stat`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/features/README.md", "docs/archive/PROJECT-OVERVIEW.md", "docs/archive/V2-OVERVIEW.md"], "verifyCommand": "ls docs/features/ docs/archive/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dirs exist", "V1 docs moved", "README skeleton with 12 rows", "1 commit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Parallel Subagent Dispatch - Generate 12 Playbooks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dispatch 12 general-purpose subagents in 1 message; each reads 1 module code and writes docs/features/<module>.md per 7-section template.

**Files:** Create docs/features/{auth,users,buildings,room-groups,rooms,tenants,services,contracts,invoices,payments,notifications,calendar}.md

**Verify:** `ls docs/features/*.md | wc -l` => 13; `grep -lE 'TBD|FIXME' docs/features/` => empty

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/features/auth.md","docs/features/users.md","docs/features/buildings.md","docs/features/room-groups.md","docs/features/rooms.md","docs/features/tenants.md","docs/features/services.md","docs/features/contracts.md","docs/features/invoices.md","docs/features/payments.md","docs/features/notifications.md","docs/features/calendar.md"], "verifyCommand": "ls docs/features/*.md | wc -l && grep -lE 'TBD|FIXME' docs/features/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["12 files created", "7 sections each", "250-700 lines", "no TBD/FIXME", "edge cases per module pinned in spec"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Cross-Reference Consistency Pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify Section 6 cross-module deps are symmetric; section structure uniform; spot-check enums/routes/i18n.

**Files:** Modify (only if asymmetry found) any docs/features/*.md

**Verify:** Manual review + `for f in docs/features/*.md; do echo "$f: $(grep -c '^## ' $f) sections"; done`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/features/*.md (only if mismatch)"], "verifyCommand": "for f in docs/features/[!R]*.md; do echo \"$f: $(grep -c '^## ' $f)\"; done", "acceptanceCriteria": ["symmetric deps", "7 sections per file", "spot-checks pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Finalize README Index
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace TBD in docs/features/README.md with 1-line summaries extracted from each playbook's 'Vai tro trong domain' line.

**Files:** Modify docs/features/README.md

**Verify:** `grep TBD docs/features/README.md` => empty

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/features/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep TBD docs/features/README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no TBD remaining", "12 rows have summaries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Final Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run spec verification checklist, manual spot-check 2 random playbook files, report final summary.

**Files:** None modified (except fix commit if spot-check fails)

**Verify:** `git log --oneline -6` shows docs(features) commits

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "ls docs/features/ && ls docs/archive/ && grep -lE 'TBD|FIXME' docs/features/ && git log --oneline -6", "acceptanceCriteria": ["13 files in features", "archive populated", "no placeholders", "3-4 commits", "spot-checks pass"]}
```
